Story of Midtown Toronto

73 Broadway Avenue, Toronto, ON, M4P 0G3

Experience best-in-class Resident services & amenities at a premier location. Choose from a variety of rental living options suitable for any phase of your story, from sustainably revitalized legacy suites at 75 Broadway Ave., to brand new elevated apartments at 73 Broadway Ave. in a wide range of layouts.

Price Range: $2205 - $4555

Amenities:

  • BBQ Patio
  • Business center
  • Dishwasher available
  • Dog Park
  • Dog wash
  • Fitness Centre
  • Fitness room
  • Fully Renovated Gym & Lobby - Coming Spring 2021
  • Microwave
  • Party Room
  • Pets Friendly
  • Rooftop Lounge
  • Spin Room
  • Stove
  • Terrace
  • Wi-Fi
  • Yoga Studio
